name: sign_in_otp
description: Send a magic link or one-time password (OTP) to the user's email or phone for passwordless sign-in. The user clicks the link or enters the code to authenticate. If the user does not exist and 'create_user' is true (default), a new account is created automatically.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The user's email address. Use either email or phone, not both.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: The user's phone number in E.164 format. Use either email or phone, not both.

parameters.name: create_user
parameters.description: Whether to create the user if they don't exist. Default is true.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Custom user metadata for newly created users.
